reduceKineticResistance		Weapons can reduce target kinetic resistance for 4 seconds.No

Source Evidence

SourceWhat the client data proves
SpriteCache image ED7A517F-F6AE-F91C-D2AD-AB1941711538 / artifact_unique_ring_of_yxthal
CrateCrate Unique Artifact: crate 99.8%, artifact 99.9%
RuntimeDropManager reads a containsUniqueArtifact flag from the server spawn message, then Player loads the actual artifact id on pickup.
Stat ruleArtifactStat.isUnique marks this stat family as unique and non-upgradeable.
Boss evidenceNo direct boss-name match in client data.
